---
title: "knn"
output: html_document
---

```{r}
train <- readRDS("train_dummy.rds")
test <- readRDS("test_dummy.rds")
```

# building the model 

```{r}

library(class)

anyNA(train)


knn_pred <- knn(train = train[,(-ncol(train)-1)],
                  test = test[,(-ncol(test)-1)],
                  cl = train[,(ncol(train)-1)],
                  k = 18,
                  prob = TRUE)

knn_prob <- attr(knn_pred, "prob")

saveRDS(knn_pred, file = "knn.rds")
saveRDS(knn_prob, file = "knn_probability.rds")

```
